data.description:
## Why
Provision the auto-lander bot's Gerrit credential and the server-level capability it needs to rebase-on-behalf and submit — without an IAM change and without a broad impersonation grant. Split out of S5 (`perpetual-ultrasonic-raccoon`).

## Files
- `infra/terraform/ssm.tf` — EDIT: add `/rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token` to the existing `local.rebar_secret_params` set (the `for_each` `aws_ssm_parameter` resource with `ignore_changes = [value]` + CHANGEME sentinel), NOT a standalone resource.
- `infra/scripts/fetch-secrets.sh` — EDIT: add the mapping `autolander-gerrit-token → AUTOLANDER_GERRIT_TOKEN`, materialized into the SAME shared `.env` (distinct env-var from the review-bot's `GERRIT_BOT_TOKEN`).
- `infra/gerrit/setup-all-projects.sh` — NEW (concrete, single file): admin-only provisioning of the `All-Projects` `refs/meta/config` `[capability]` grant. (A dedicated script because `All-Projects` is a distinct config target from the `rebar` project that `setup-project.sh` manages; keeping it separate avoids conflating the two refs.)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] **Credential:** the Gerrit HTTP token is an SSM **SecureString** at `/rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token` — inside the existing `parameter/rebar/prod/*` prefix the EC2 instance-role IAM policy (`iam.tf` `ssm_params_read`) already grants, so **NO IAM change** (`iam.tf` is read-only/unchanged; a `/rebar/autolander/*` path would fall outside the grant). Added via the `ssm.tf` `for_each` set; fetched by `fetch-secrets.sh` into the shared `.env` as `AUTOLANDER_GERRIT_TOKEN`; never inlined.
- [ ] **Capability:** `infra/gerrit/setup-all-projects.sh` grants the `RebarBotNava` service user the **`rebaseOnBehalfOfUploader`** server-level capability (`All-Projects` `refs/meta/config` `[capability]`) — a scoped, minimum-necessary grant, NOT broad `Impersonate` — plus **submit permission on `refs/heads/*`** (project.config restricts `submit` to `Contributors`+Administrators, so the bot must hold it or every `POST /submit` 403s). Admin-only `refs/meta/config` push (operator cutover).
- [ ] **Tests:** `setup-all-projects.sh` is idempotent (re-run is a no-op); a smoke check confirms the token materializes into `.env` and the bot can authenticate + submit a test change on the instance.
data.title: S5b Credentials (SSM) + All-Projects capability + submit ACL provisioning
